description: A pencil or charcoal drawing on paper showing a ceiling design divided into four triangular sections by diagonal lines meeting at a central point. Each triangular section contains clusters of loosely drawn human figures in dynamic, tumbling, or reclining poses. The upper sections show figures in agitated motion, some appearing to fall or float. The lower section contains a more densely packed group of seated or crouching figures. The drawing is executed in rapid, energetic strokes with heavy shading and minimal detail, giving the figures a spectral, dissolving quality.
